title: tdd codex-judge post-green verdict
description: Structured verdict from the independent cross-model verifier after a slice goes green. Passed to `codex exec --output-schema`.

verdict.description: pass = implementation faithfully satisfies the spec, no gaming, edges covered. concerns = at least one finding.

findings.description: Empty when verdict is pass. Each finding is one concrete, independently-checkable problem.

kind.description: spec-gap = code+tests agree but both diverge from intent; anti-cheat = gamed gate; safety = a harm path; missing-edge = real input/garbage not covered; type-quality = public type wider than spec.

detail.description: What is wrong and why it matters, concretely enough to act on.
